data.title: REJO introduces REJO CUBE modular device in Japan, offers trendy design and dual-mode inhalation. Launches on major e-commerce retail channels on February 16.
data.description: In Tokyo, REJO, a leading global provider of heat-not-burn (HNB) solutions, unveiled the REJO CUBE, its new modular HNB device worldwide. The REJO CUBE, diverging from traditional HNB designs, offers a stylish design and dual-mode inhalation experience. It is set to be available on Japan's primary e-commerce retail platforms starting February 16. This release follows the successful introduction of REJO Mate Air in Japan.

data.title: Adam Back warns about BIP-110 Ordinals fix, fearing it could lock user funds, creator confident in safeguards.
data.description: Adam Back from Blockstream has expressed concerns that BIP-110 has the potential to lock up user funds. However, the creator of the proposal has defended it by stating that there are protective measures in place to avoid such a scenario. The proposal has stirred up debate within the cryptocurrency community due to its implications for user funds, with critics pointing out the risks involved. It is crucial for the community to carefully consider these concerns before moving forward with implementing BIP-110.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies fall, with Bitcoin at $68,674 (-1.24%), Ethereum $1,966 (-4.83%), XRP $1.47 (-3.46%), Dogecoin $0.1022 (-8.45%). Market faces selling pressure, $325M liquidated, Bitcoin could reach $79,000.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies experienced falls on Sunday, with Bitcoin at -1.24% ($68,673.86), Ethereum at -4.83% ($1,966.09), XRP at -3.46% ($1.47), Solana at -2.14% ($86.05), and Dogecoin at -8.45% ($0.1022). Bitcoin faced selling pressure, with a trading volume increase of 11% and a $325 million market liquidation in 24 hours, including $240 million in bullish bets. Ethereum also saw heavy selling, dropping below $2,000 with an 80% spike in trading volume. The majority remained long on Binance, despite the crypto market's "Extreme Fear" sentiment per the Crypto Fear & Greed Index. Stock futures rose due to easing consumer inflation to an 8-month low.

data.title: Law firm investigating data privacy claims for North Star Fertility Partners LLC due to a data breach on August 12, 2025.
data.description: A law firm called Edelson Lechtzin LLP, located in suburban Philadelphia, is currently examining data privacy allegations related to an occurrence at North Star Fertility Partners LLC ("Northstar"). The data breach was discovered by Northstar on August 12, 2025. The law firm is investigating this potentially concerning situation.

data.title: Investigation by Edelson Lechtzin LLP into a data breach at Strategic Investment Solutions Inc, discovered on or about November 3, 2026. Data of clients may have been compromised.
data.description: A law firm based in suburban Philadelphia, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, is currently investigating data privacy claims related to a recent data breach at Strategic Investment Solutions Inc. ("SIS"). The breach was discovered around November 3, 2026. The incident has raised concerns about the security of personal information held by SIS. Edelson Lechtzin LLP is looking into the matter to assess the potential impact on individuals affected by the breach.
